About Me

Engineering ideas
into reality

I'm a third-year Computer Science student at R.M.K. Engineering College, Kavaraipettai, Tamil Nadu, with a CGPA of 8.38/10.

Completed a Java Developer Internship at Infosys Springboard (Feb – Apr 2026), where I built a full-stack Library Management System with Spring Boot, React, and MySQL.

From FarmXchange connecting farmers to consumers, to CivicConnect empowering citizens — I love building products that make a real difference.

Presentation

Research Presentation

Paper presented at a national conference — bridging technology and agriculture.

📋 Paper Presentation ✅ Presented ISBN: 978-93-342-1120-7
May 5–6, 2025

FarmXchange: A Direct Marketplace Connecting Farmers and Consumers for Fair Trade and Transparent Transactions

Conference 5th National Conference on Recent Advancements in Science, Engineering & Technologies (RASET 2025)
Institution Bannari Amman Institute of Technology, Sathyamangalam, Tamil Nadu
Department Electronics & Communication Engineering · AquaTech Innovation (ATI) Special Laboratory
Abstract

Farmers in most regions face exploitation by intermediaries who dominate supply chains, control market prices, and capture the majority of profit margins. This paper proposes an integrated web-based platform — FarmXchange — that directly connects farmers with consumers and retailers, eliminating intermediaries and enabling fairer, transparent transactions.

The platform features real-time price negotiation, an NLP-based AI chatbot, location-based recommendations using the Haversine Algorithm, an Urgent Stock module to reduce food wastage, blockchain-secured payments, and AI-driven market insights — empowering farmers to retain control over pricing and expand market access.

Keywords
Farmer Marketplace Supply Chain NLP Chatbot Haversine Algorithm Blockchain Real-time Negotiation NodeJS MongoDB Fair Trade
